title: zantedeschia hastata
intro: Zantedeschia hastata, also known as the Arum Lily, is a flowering plant species within the Colchicaceae family. It is native to southern Africa and is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating rheumatism, fever, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Zantedeschia hastata include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiseptic activities. Herbal preparations of the plant's rhizomes and roots can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses.
